queries.dax: DEFINE MEASURE RG_ActProf[MedidaFacturacion] = SUM(RG_ActProf[TotFac])VAR tblRank = SUMMARIZECOLUMNS(Sedes[Sede], "TotFact", [MedidaFacturacion])EVALUATE tblRank ORDER BY [TotFact] DESC

DEFINE MEASURE RG_ActProf[MedidaFacturacion] = CALCULATE(SUM(RG_ActProf[TotFac]), CONTAINSSTRING(RG_ActProf[Tipo],  "PGP")) VAR tblRank = SUMMARIZECOLUMNS(Sedes[Sede], "TotFact", [MedidaFacturacion]) EVALUATE tblRank ORDER BY [TotFact] DESC

DEFINE MEASURE RG_ActProf[MedidaFacturacion] = CALCULATE(SUM(RG_ActProf[TotFac]), CONTAINSSTRING(RG_ActProf[Tipo],  "Evento")) VAR tblRank = SUMMARIZECOLUMNS(Sedes[Sede], "TotFact", [MedidaFacturacion]) EVALUATE tblRank ORDER BY [TotFact] DESC

DEFINE MEASURE RG_ActProf[MedidaFacturacion] = SUM(RG_ActProf[TotFac])EVALUATE TOPN(10,SUMMARIZE(RG_ActProf,Entidad[Entidad],RG_ActProf[Tipo],"TotFact", [MedidaFacturacion]),[TotFact], DESC)ORDER BY [TotFact] DESC

DEFINE MEASURE RG_ActProf[MedidaFacturacion] = CALCULATE(SUM(RG_ActProf[TotFac]), RG_ActProf[Tipo] = "Evento") VAR tblRank = SUMMARIZECOLUMNS(Entidad[Entidad], "TotFact", [MedidaFacturacion]) EVALUATE TOPN(10, tblRank, [MedidaFacturacion], DESC) ORDER BY [TotFact] DESC

DEFINE MEASURE RG_ActProf[MedidaFacturacion] = CALCULATE(SUM(RG_ActProf[TotFac]), RG_ActProf[Tipo] = "PGP") VAR tblRank = SUMMARIZECOLUMNS(Entidad[Entidad], "TotFact", [MedidaFacturacion]) EVALUATE TOPN(10, tblRank, [MedidaFacturacion], DESC) ORDER BY [TotFact] DESC

queries.query_id: TOP 10 Facturacion por aseguradora en tiempo real
queries.description: Facturacion por aseguradora en tiempo real
queries.dax: DEFINE VAR tblRank = SUMMARIZECOLUMNS(Entidad[Entidad], RG_ActProf[Tipo], "TotFact", [Total fac mes]) EVALUATE TOPN(10, tblRank, [Total fac mes], DESC) ORDER BY [TotFact] DESC

queries.query_id: Facturacion total por sede en tiempo real
queries.description: Facturacion total por sede en tiempo real
queries.dax: EVALUATE SUMMARIZECOLUMNS(Sedes[Sede], "Facturacion Total", [Total fac mes]) ORDER BY [Facturacion Total] DESC
